<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep changes focused — this library's value is that it
     stays small and auditable. Security issue? See SECURITY.md, don't open a PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: Fixes #… -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`npm test` passes) — including a regression test if this
      touches redaction, verification, or content-stream handling
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified above — "no native binaries, runs in
      Lambda" is a core promise)
- [ ] README / types / comments updated if the public API changed
